testcase.name: test_target_hit_alert

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected target_hits>=1; got {'created': 1, 'price_moves': 1, 'target_hits': 0}. Likely root cause: _check_price_moves runs first and overwrites ticker_state.last_price before _check_target_crosses reads it. assert 0 >= 1

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_portfolio.py:281: in test_target_hit_alert assert body["target_hits"] >= 1, ( E AssertionError: Expected target_hits>=1; got {'created': 1, 'price_moves': 1, 'target_hits': 0}. Likely root cause: _check_price_moves runs first and overwrites ticker_state.last_price before _check_target_crosses reads it. E assert 0 >= 1

testcase.name: test_stop_loss_hit_alert

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected stop-loss alert; got {'created': 1, 'price_moves': 1, 'target_hits': 0} assert 0 >= 1

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_portfolio.py:322: in test_stop_loss_hit_alert assert body["target_hits"] >= 1, f"Expected stop-loss alert; got {body}" E AssertionError: Expected stop-loss alert; got {'created': 1, 'price_moves': 1, 'target_hits': 0} E assert 0 >= 1

testcase.name: test_target_alert_cooldown

failure.message: AssertionError: First sync should fire target hit: {'created': 1, 'price_moves': 1, 'target_hits': 0} assert 0 >= 1

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_portfolio.py:399: in test_target_alert_cooldown assert first_hits >= 1, f"First sync should fire target hit: {r1}" E AssertionError: First sync should fire target hit: {'created': 1, 'price_moves': 1, 'target_hits': 0} E assert 0 >= 1
